features: ✅ COMPATIBLE WITH: Numatic Henry Hoover, Henry Plus, Henry Micro, Henry Xtra, Hetty, James, Basil, David, Edward, Nuvac, Rucksack, Henry HVR200A, Henry Micro HVR200M-22 Vacuum Cleaners

😌 EASY TO USE: Replacing the dust bag is quick and easy—no tools required! For optimal performance, we recommend changing the bag every 3 to 6 months, depending on your usage. Regular replacements ensure your vacuum cleaner continues to operate at peak efficiency, keeping your home clean and fresh.
📦 WHAT'S IN THE PACK: Pack of 10 Microfibre Vacuum Bags
🧹NO MESS: Auto-shut mechanism which automatically closes the bag when the vacuum cleaner is opened, meaning you won't be exposed to unhygienic dirt.

⭐️EFFECTIVE FILTRATION: These replacement GN vacuum dust bags are crafted from premium 5-layer microfiber material, delivering superior filtration and capturing even the smallest particles. Designed to trap dust, pet dander, and allergens, they retain 99.9% of micro particles as tiny as 0.3 microns. This advanced filtration helps improve cleaning efficiency and creates a cleaner, healthier home environment.
